Home / Blog / PVC tarpaulin laminating machine buying guide

PVC tarpaulin laminating machine buying guide

PVC tarpaulin laminating machine buying guide: Share material, width, speed, power supply and factory country. An engineer can reply with a practical configuration. Quotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production. PVC Tarpaulin Laminating Machine.

1. Match the machine to the material

Share material, width, speed, power supply and factory country. An engineer can reply with a practical configuration. PVC Tarpaulin Laminating Machine: PVC film, tarpaulin, tent fabric and flex banner.

2. Confirm width, speed and tension

Target width, Target speed, m/min, Voltage / frequency. Quotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production.

3. Check local power before quotation

Quotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production. 380 V, 50 Hz, 415 V, 50 Hz, 440 V, 60 Hz.

4. Ask for a practical layout

Send machine requirements. Share material, width, speed, power supply and factory country. An engineer can reply with a practical configuration.
